pages.text: Among other things, horses trottle at a good speed, and can be encouraged to gallop even faster, although that difficults steering. They can jump high and swim decently well.$(br2) Their speed stacks up with that of $(thing)$(t:Blocks that can be searched as 'Valid path block' in JEI.)path blocks$().

Horses live in a variety of $(thing)$(t:Plains, Savanna/Savanna M, Savanna Plateau/Savanna Plateau M, Chaparral, Grassland, Orchard, Prairie, Shrubland, Steppe, Sunflower Plains.)grassy plains$(), although they are particularly common in $(bold)steppes$() and $(bold)grasslands$(). And although a grazing animal, they are huge lovers of prepared $(bold)$(l:survival/gathering/hawthorne)hawthornes$(), the $(bold)key to unlock their true potential$().

Finally, not only are horses a fast method of transport. They can power $(l:innovation/mechpower/horsepower)certain machinery$() just like cows, and pull $(thing)$(t:While mounting a horse, press the default key [G] to attach or detach the cart.)plows and cars$().
